register.title: Create account
register.terms: By signing up, you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Check your inbox for the verification link

errors.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.emailFailed: Failed to send email. Please try again.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
errors.verificationFailed: Verification failed. Invalid or expired token.
errors.resetFailed: Password reset failed. Please try again.

messages.registrationSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.
messages.resetEmailSent: If an account exists with that email, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
messages.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
messages.verificationSuccess: Your email has been verified successfully. You can now sign in to your account.
